pattern: Reverse only the contiguous sublist between two 1-indexed positions, stitching the reversed segment back to the untouched prefix and suffix.
hints: Only the nodes from position left to position right change order; the parts before left and after right stay exactly as they are.
Advance to the node just before position left and hold it — that anchor's next pointer must end up aimed at the segment's new front.
Reverse the right - left + 1 nodes of the segment in place, then connect the anchor to the segment's new head and the segment's new tail to the node that followed position right.

stress.description: long random list with a valid random [left, right] window
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = rng.randint(1, min(max(size, 1), 500))
    arr = [rng.randint(-500, 500) for _ in range(n)]
    left = rng.randint(1, n)
    right = rng.randint(left, n)
    return [arr, left, right]
stress.note: left/right always satisfy 1 <= left <= right <= n
